summary: Iteration 135: Tested WhatsApp toggle persistence, WhatsApp groups API, RST duplicate check, PDF party_only parameter, and Weighbridge config. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: WhatsApp toggle auto-saves, group dropdown loads, Weighbridge shows Desktop App message, WA icons visible in Vehicle Weight.
seed_data_creation: Created test vehicle weight entries during backend testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified: 1) WhatsApp toggle auto-saves on click (Settings > Messaging tab), 2) WhatsApp Groups dropdown loads from /api/whatsapp/groups, 3) Weighbridge Configuration shows 'Desktop App only' message on web (expected), 4) RST duplicate check returns 400 error, 5) PDF party_only=1 returns single copy, 6) WA icons visible in Vehicle Weight completed entries when WA enabled. Settings page has sub-tabs: Branding, GST, Stock, Messaging, Data. WhatsApp section is under Messaging tab.

features_tested.backend_whatsapp_settings_get: PASS - GET /api/whatsapp/settings returns enabled, default_group_id, default_group_name
features_tested.backend_whatsapp_settings_put_false: PASS - PUT with enabled=false persists disabled state
features_tested.backend_whatsapp_settings_put_true: PASS - PUT with enabled=true and group fields persists
features_tested.backend_rst_duplicate_check: PASS - POST /api/vehicle-weight with duplicate RST returns 400
features_tested.frontend_settings_navigation: PASS - Settings tab navigates to Settings page
features_tested.frontend_messaging_tab: PASS - Messaging sub-tab shows WhatsApp section
features_tested.frontend_whatsapp_toggle: PASS - WhatsApp toggle shows ON/OFF state and auto-saves
features_tested.frontend_whatsapp_group_dropdown: PASS - Group dropdown present with refresh button
features_tested.frontend_weighbridge_section: PASS - Shows 'Desktop App only' message (expected for web)
features_tested.frontend_vehicle_weight_page: PASS - Vehicle Weight page loads with scale display
features_tested.frontend_wa_icons_visibility: PASS - 4 WA icons and 4 Group icons visible in completed entries
